item.title: 0.1 Beta 9
item.description:
Habitat Version 0.1 Beta 9

What's New & Improved

  • Improved: System load and performance issues for older generation M series chips.
  • Improved: Removed amount of dividers in the spark menubar battery statistics.
  • Added: Low power mode indicator to battery menubar icon.
  • Added: Height adjustment to nook so users can adjust the look to their liking around the notch.
  • Fixed: The nook popping up repeatedly if cursor was left on the notch.
  • Fixed: Camera permission breaking for some users in The Nook.
  • Fixed: Safari trackpad reversed scroll direction issue.
  • Fixed: Some apps not working with unminimize gesture when in dock.
  • Fixed: Window snapping reset config after gesture performed on window and then grabbing title bar.

More to come.
— Thank you for all the support & feedback!
